titleStmt.title: SII 37.458: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 458. (A.R. No. B 25 of 1942-43.) Pagiḍyāla, Nandikotkur Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab set up near the Āñjanēyasvāmi temple.
This is dated in Śaka 1439, Īśvara, Jyēshṭha ba. 30, Friday, Solar eclipse, corresponding to 1517 A.D., June 19.

It records that Yenumula Timmānāyanigāru restored the lands as sarvamānya gift to the gods at Paiṁḍāla by exempting the assessment before god Mallikārjuna at Bejavāḍa, on the banks of the Kṛishna, for the merit of Kṛishnarāya-Mahārāya and his own preceptor and parents.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1439 Agunēṭi Īśvara sa
ṁvatsara jēṣṭa ba 30 śu śrīmatu yenumula
tiṁmānāyanigāru paiṁḍāla dēvaḷa vritti bā
laku vrāIṁccina dharmaśāsanaṁ . Ī dēvaḷa kṣētrā
la dhānyālu kritaṁ koṁdaru rājulu dharmamudappi pū
ṭeṁdumulu puccukonaṁgānu tiṁmānēni
gāru ye tathātithi sūryagrahaṇa puṇyakāla
maṁdu bejavāḍa mallikārjunadēvara saṁnidhini
kriṣṇalōpalanu kriṣṇarāyamahārāyalakuṁnu ta
ma guruvulakuṁnu tamataṁḍri nārepanēniṁgā
rikini tama tallikini tamakuṁnu puṁṇyaṁgānu pu
ṭṭedumuluṁ māni sarvamānyaṁgānu dhāra
vōśi Istimi . Iṁduku yavvaru dapinānu
tamatallidaṁḍṟlanuṁnu gōbrāṁhmaniṁni
vāraṇāśilōnu vadhaIṁcina pāpānabōI
navāru . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṁṇyaṁ pa
radatānupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa sva
dattaṁ niḥṣpalaṁ bhavēt . maṁggaḷama
hā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 37.458 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
